package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_returns_tx_to_caller: Services that hand transaction objects back to handlers or controllers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule180NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule180NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule180NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario180Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule180NegativeService, input Rule180NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
